title: Sciver-Brunt hits fifty to give England hope in World Cup final | Cricket News

blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: Sciver-Brunt hits fifty to give England hope in World Cup final. England captain Nat Sciver-Brunt leads from the front as she finishes unbeaten on 58 to help her side post 150 in the Women's T20 World Cup final against Australia at Lord's.
